error_signature: 403 Forbidden - The token does not have access to this location
context_key: HTTP Request node for GoHighLevel API
title: 403 Forbidden when creating GoHighLevel contacts
symptom: When attempting to create a contact using the HTTP Request node, n8n returns a 403 Forbidden error indicating that the token does not have access to the location.
applies_when: Attempting to create contacts in GoHighLevel
not_this_if: Credentials tested successfully with GET endpoint
root_cause: The error occurs because the API token being used does not have the necessary permissions to access the endpoint for creating contacts. This can happen if the token is not correctly configured or if required parameters are missing from the request.
fix_steps: Ensure that the API token has the correct permissions for creating contacts.
Include the locationId in the request body as required by the GoHighLevel API.
Use the cURL import feature in n8n to automatically configure the HTTP Request node with the correct settings.
agent_instruction: Verify the API token permissions and include the locationId in your request body.
